type_definitions.name: FsCatalogueLoader
type_definitions.description: Filesystem-backed CatalogueLoader: iterates tddd.enabled layers via load_tddd_layers_from_path and decodes each catalogue_file via catalogue_codec::decode with reject_symlinks_below guard

type_definitions.name: FsContractMapWriter
type_definitions.description: Filesystem-backed ContractMapWriter: atomic_write_file with reject_symlinks_below guard, writing to track/items/<id>/contract-map.md
